title: polyscias hildebrandtii
intro: Polyscias hildebrandtii, also known as the African polynema or Hildebrandt's tree, is a species of flowering plant in the aralia family native to Madagascar. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Polyscias hildebrandtii include its ability to treat various health issues such as respiratory problems, skin infections, and digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions that can be consumed as a tea or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
